name: california-san-diego
description: San Diego County civic data from official county government websites

config.description: San Diego County civic data from official county government websites

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract scheduled and past San Diego County Board of Supervisors meetings — meeting date, time, location, agenda PDF link, and minutes link when available. Each item should yield one Meeting record with externalId (date + body slug), title, body ('San Diego County Board of Supervisors'), scheduledAt (combined date + time), location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl.
hints: San Diego County Board of Supervisors publishes meeting agendas at this URL
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, body, scheduledAt, location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl
Past meetings and upcoming meetings may live on the same page or on tabbed/paginated sections — capture both when present

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract San Diego County Board of Supervisors members — name, district number, party affiliation if listed, photo URL, contact info (phone, email, district office address), and profile page link. Construct externalId as 'california-san-diego-supervisor-{district}' using the district number.
hints: externalId: construct as 'california-san-diego-supervisor-{district}' using the district number
The HTML contains a navigation menu structure with 'navbar', 'dropdown', and 'dropdown-menu' classes, but no visible representative list data in the provided snippet.
The provided HTML snippet is truncated (indicated by '<!-- [truncated] -->') and does not contain the main content area where representative data would likely be located.
The structure suggests a Bootstrap-based layout ('bootstrap-wrapper', 'navbar-inverse'), so representative data is likely in a separate section not included in the snippet.
No 'img' tags or 'a' tags with representative-specific classes are visible in the current snippet to confirm field locations.

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract current and past ballot measures for San Diego County — measure identifier (letter/number), full title, election date, sponsoring jurisdiction, measure type (bond, tax, initiative, ordinance, charter amendment, etc.), summary description, and official outcome (passed/failed) where available.
hints: San Diego County Registrar of Voters publishes ballot measures at this URL

Extract current and past ballot measures — measure letter/number, title, election date, jurisdiction (county, city, district), measure type (bond, tax, initiative, etc.), short description, and outcome when available
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, electionDate, jurisdiction, measureType, description, outcome

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract campaign finance disclosure filings for San Diego County — committee name, filer type (candidate/measure committee), election, total contributions received, total expenditures made, and top contributors with amounts.
hints: San Diego County campaign finance disclosure portal
Extract campaign finance filings — committee name, candidate or measure supported/opposed, filing date, total contributions, total expenditures, top contributors (name, amount), and reporting period
Use these EXACT field names: committeeId, committeeName, candidateOrMeasure, filingDate, totalContributions, totalExpenditures, reportingPeriod
NOTE: UNCERTAIN — San Diego uses its own EFDS (not NetFile). Public portal is at sdvote.com.
